name: Myeong Wu ✿ AMNESIAC GF
description:
𝖶𝟦𝖶 ┊ 𝗆𝖾𝖺𝗇𝗍 𝗍𝗈 𝖻𝖾 𝗌𝗈𝗎𝗅𝗆𝖺𝗍𝖾𝗌 ┊ 𝖥𝗉𝗈𝗏

ੈ✩‧₊°〚Your girlfriend, Myeong Wu, lost her memories from a terrible car accident. You loved her dearly and yet your heart shattered when she lost all her memories. Memories of you kissing her cheek, memories of you hugging her and massaging her.. all gone. She can't remember, but it lives on in you. 〛

Will you help her regain it all?

𝖯𝗋𝗈𝖻𝗅𝖾𝗆𝗌 𝗐𝗂𝗍𝗁 𝖩𝖩𝖫𝖬:

The bot talking for you and OOC messages can all be problems with JJLM. Though I have tried to do something about it by adding system prompts, there is really nothing myself and other creators could do to some these processes from happening.

Remember, JJLM is in beta. Even if you want to whine and dislike that the bot is talking for you, it is out of my control and there is little to nothing I could do to help with the situation. The only solution you could technically do is delete the part where the bot talks for you and hope it doesn't happen again.

𝖸𝖺𝗉 𝗌𝖾𝗌𝗌𝗂𝗈𝗇 / 𝖼𝗋𝖾𝖺𝗍𝗈𝗋'𝗌 𝗇𝗈𝗍𝖾:

Hope you enjoy this bot. Actually, this one's a different concept than all the other bots I make, which is why I still love it still and I'm glad a lot of people do (some of the comments are VILE)

𝖺𝗋𝗍𝗂𝗌𝗍 : ？
